title: Checkpoint
description: A point-in-time snapshot of a smooth-operator agent's state. Checkpoints are written by the agent runtime and are used to resume execution after interruptions (Lambda cold starts, HITL pauses, network errors). Corresponds to the `Checkpoint` struct in the smooth-operator Rust crate.

threadId.description: smooth-operator workflow thread identifier this checkpoint belongs to. Matches `Session.threadId` for the associated session.

agentId.description: The agent whose state is captured in this checkpoint.

iteration.description: Agent loop iteration counter at the time the checkpoint was taken.

metadata.description: Arbitrary string key/value metadata attached to this checkpoint (e.g. phase name, bead ID).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the checkpoint was created.
